basics.name: Abhyudaya Baghel
basics.title: AWS Java Developer | Emerging Tech Professional
basics.summary: I am a proactive technology professional with hands-on experience in software development and data analysis. Armed with a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science from Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology, I specialize in Java, C++, Python, and JavaScript, alongside proficiency in frameworks like Django, React, and Node.js. My journey includes impactful internships where I developed dynamic systems in Python and optimized Java and SQL-based solutions, enhancing efficiency across inventory management and client data aggregation. Driven by a passion for innovation and problem-solving, my career journey has been marked by proficiency in languages such as Java, C++, Python, and JavaScript, complemented by expertise in frameworks like Django, React, and Node.js. I have honed these skills through hands-on projects, including a dynamic inventory management system in Python and optimized client data aggregation solutions using Java and SQL. My internships at Elite Techno Group and HighRadius have equipped me with practical experience in software development and data analysis, setting the stage for my next role in leveraging technology to drive impactful solutions. I am actively seeking opportunities where I can apply my technical skills and contribute to innovative projects. With a keen interest in roles that challenge me to innovate and solve complex problems using emerging technologies, I am eager to join a dynamic team that fosters growth and collaboration. Let's connect to explore how my skills can contribute to your organization's success.

bullets: Modernizing legacy systems into an event-driven AWS cloud architecture using Lambda, Step Functions, EventBridge, and S3, enhancing scalability and automation efficiency.
Developed and deployed serverless Java-based AWS Lambda functions integrated with PostgreSQL (RDS) using Spring JDBC, securing APIs with ADFS authentication.
Implemented CI/CD automation using Jules and Spinnaker, provisioning infrastructure with Terraform and maintaining database versioning via Liquibase.
Driving system modernization by developing backend services with Java (Maven) and Spring Boot, integrating AWS components like Lambda, Step Functions, EventBridge, and S3.
Within an Agile environment, design efficient workflows to replace legacy systems, boosting reliability and scalability while deepening expertise in microservices and cloud-native architectures.
Enhanced client data aggregation workflows by debugging and optimizing Java–Spring–SQL applications, achieving a 30% increase in efficiency.
Analyzed and optimized legacy systems, resulting in a 25% improvement in performance and responsiveness.
Actively contributed to projects involving Data Migration and Robotic Process Automation, honing proficiency in SQL and Java.
Effectively utilized tools such as Eclipse IDE, Putty, Jira, and MySQL to support and optimize these projects.
Developed a dynamic inventory management system using Python and JSON, improving record management by 40%.
Performed data analysis and visualization on Olympic datasets, identifying performance trends and improving analytical decision accuracy by 50%.
Brought advanced skills in Pandas and NumPy, with a passion for data analysis and strong problem-solving abilities.

projects.title: Web3 Blockchain Crowdfunding Platform
bullets: Developed a decentralized crowdfunding application using Ethereum, Solidity, and Web3.js, ensuring secure and transparent transactions.
Enabled creation and contribution to smart-contract-based crowdfunding campaigns, improving transactional traceability and transparency.

projects.title: Calorie Calculator API
bullets: Designed a RESTful Django-based API delivering real-time nutritional data for food items, hosted and documented via GitHub.
Streamlined calorie tracking workflows, improving usability for web-based fitness applications.
